abilities.name: Accomplice
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, a friendly model within 6" that has not activated this turn may discard a card to do so.

abilities.name: Burnt Out
abilities.text: Once per activation. When an enemy within 8" declares an action, this model may remove a Burning token from it to make the action fail.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

actions.name: Obey
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. This action may target friendly models. Target declares an action, chosen and controlled by this model.

triggers.name: Moment of Weakness
triggers.text: Once per turn. Target enemy model must not have activated this turn. The target must be the next enemy model chosen to activate this turn.

actions.name: Feet to the Flames
actions.effects: The target gains a Burning token. For each raise this action receives, make a Shadow or Scheme marker within 1" of the target.

triggers.name: Duality
triggers.text: Enemy only. This model must choose: both players draw a card or both players discard a card.

actions.name: Twisting Incense
actions.effects: Target heals 2, plus 1 per raise this action receives, and gains an Aura (Concealment) token.

triggers.name: Darkness
triggers.text: Make a Shadow marker within 1" of the target.

actions.name: Sabotage Their Plans
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Target an enemy Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target, then remove the target.
